summary: Video. Continuous slow shot of Air Force One taking off and flying away from a U.S. airfield with a helicopter escort, captioned 'WHEELS UP FOR CHINA' with a rocket emoji, before Trump's Beijing trip. It has a music bed (music_score 0.87). It is a single uninterrupted shot of one takeoff with no montage editing, graphics, text overlays, or cuts timed to the music.
